aes.title: AES
aes.description: Encrypt and decrypt text with AES. Supports ECB/CBC/CTR modes and PKCS7/Zero/None padding. All computation runs locally.

md5.title: MD5
md5.description: Compute MD5 hash of text or files. Supports UTF-8/GBK encoding and chunked file processing. All computation runs locally.

sha2.title: SHA-2
sha2.description: Compute SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashes. Supports text and file input. All computation runs locally.

sha3.title: SHA-3
sha3.description: Compute SHA3-224, SHA3-256, SHA3-384, SHA3-512 hashes. All computation runs locally.

blake.title: BLAKE
blake.description: Compute BLAKE2b and BLAKE3 hashes. Supports text and file input. All computation runs locally.

xxhash3.title: xxHash3
xxhash3.description: Compute xxHash3-64 and xxHash3-128 hashes. High-speed non-cryptographic hash algorithm. All computation runs locally.

_hash.dropFile: Drop file or click to select
_hash.fileLocal: File is processed locally, not uploaded

base64.title: Base64
base64.description: Encode and decode text with Base64. Also outputs Base64URL format. All computation runs locally.

base64-image.title: Base64 Image
base64-image.description: Convert between images and Base64 strings. Supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP and more. All processing runs locally.
base64-image.dropImage: Drop image or click to select
base64-image.b64Placeholder: Paste Base64 string or Data URL...

base58.title: Base58
base58.description: Encode and decode with Base58 (Bitcoin alphabet). All computation runs locally.
base58.invalidUtf8: Decoded result is not valid UTF-8 text, showing Hex only.

qrcode.title: QR Code
qrcode.description: Generate QR codes from text, or decode QR code images. All processing runs locally.
qrcode.dropQr: Drop QR code image or click to select

qrcode-decode.title: QR Code Decoder
qrcode-decode.description: Decode QR code images from local files. Results are extracted in your browser and never uploaded.
qrcode-decode.dropImage: Drop QR code image or click to select
qrcode-decode.canvasUnavailable: Canvas is unavailable in this browser

string-length.title: String Length
string-length.description: Count string length including character count, byte count, lines, and full/half-width stats. Calculates in real time.
string-length.placeholder: Enter text here, statistics update in real time...

password-strength.title: Password Strength
password-strength.description: Check if a password matches common weak password databases, and evaluate strength based on length, character types, and patterns. All computation runs locally.

summary.pending: Enter a password to check its strength
summary.compromised: Found in common password database — change immediately
summary.weak: Weak password, easily guessed or brute-forced
summary.medium: Medium strength — increase length or add more character types
summary.strong: Strong password with good length and character variety
summary.very-strong: Very strong password with excellent length and complexity

ugly-avatar.title: Ugly Avatar
ugly-avatar.description: Generate random quirky avatars with customizable background color. Supports SVG download. All generation runs locally.

bp-jwt.title: Server JWT Token
bp-jwt.description: Generate a HS256 JWT Token for Server API authentication. Payload includes millisecond timestamp iat and key_name fields. All computation runs locally.
bp-jwt.payloadNote: Payload includes iat (ms timestamp) and key_name (Key ID). Each click generates a new timestamp.

bp-sign.title: Client Sign
bp-sign.description: Generate Client API request signature using HmacSHA256. Format: digest,timestamp,keyId. All computation runs locally.
bp-sign.getNote: GET request signs with empty body string. Algorithm: HmacSHA256(appId + timestamp + "", keySecret)
bp-sign.bodyRaw: Signature uses the raw JSON string without any formatting.

json-format.title: JSON Format
json-format.description: Format and minify JSON. Paste your JSON, click Format to pretty-print or Minify to compress to a single line.

text-diff.title: Text Diff
text-diff.description: Compare two texts and highlight differences. Supports split and unified views with inline word-level highlighting.

regex.title: Regex Tester
regex.description: Test regular expressions in real time. Highlights matches inline, lists match positions and capture groups. All computation runs locally.

color.title: Color Picker
color.description: Pick a color and convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats. Bidirectional — type in any format to update the others. All computation runs locally.

jwt-decode.title: JWT Decoder
jwt-decode.description: Decode and inspect JWT tokens. Displays header, payload, and signature. Highlights expiry fields. Verification is not performed. All computation runs locally.
jwt-decode.noVerification: Signature is not verified — this tool only decodes the token.

url-encode.title: URL Encode
url-encode.description: Encode and decode URL components using encodeURIComponent / decodeURIComponent. All computation runs locally.
url-encode.inputPlaceholder: Enter text to encode or decode...

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. Auto-detects seconds vs milliseconds. All computation runs locally.

uuid.title: UUID Generator
uuid.description: Generate UUID v4 (random) or v7 (time-ordered) — single or batch up to 1000

random-string.title: Random String Generator
random-string.description: Generate readable random strings locally with length, character set, and number constraints.
random-string.avoidAmbiguousHint: Removes characters that are easy to confuse: 0, O, 1, I, l.
random-string.beautifulStringHint: Uses a smoother character set without g, y, j, p, q and disables special characters.

supabase-rls.title: Supabase RLS Policy Generator
supabase-rls.description: Generate common Supabase Row Level Security policy templates locally in your browser.
supabase-rls.outputPlaceholder: Enter a valid table name to generate SQL.
supabase-rls.safetyNote: Generated SQL is a starter template. Review and test it before running it in your Supabase SQL Editor. This tool runs locally and does not upload your inputs.

errors.invalidIdentifier: Use letters, digits, and underscores only (must start with a letter or underscore)

templates.ownRowsDescription: Select, insert, update, and delete only rows owned by the current user.
templates.publicReadOwnWriteDescription: Anyone can read rows; signed-in users can write only rows they own.
templates.authenticatedCrud: Authenticated users can read and write
templates.authenticatedCrudDescription: Signed-in users can select, insert, update, and delete rows.
templates.publicReadOnlyDescription: Anyone can read rows; no client write policies are generated.
templates.insertOnlyOwnRowsDescription: Signed-in users can insert rows they own, but no read, update, or delete policies are generated.

exif.title: EXIF Reader
exif.description: Extract EXIF metadata from JPEG, HEIC and other images. Camera model, exposure settings, GPS location and more. All processing runs locally.
exif.dropImage: Drop image or click to select
exif.noExif: No EXIF data found in this image

sensitive-masker.title: Sensitive Data Masker
sensitive-masker.description: Mask API keys, tokens, passwords, connection strings, and personal data before sharing text or logs. All processing runs locally.
sensitive-masker.inputPlaceholder: Paste text, .env file, or log content here...
sensitive-masker.noSecrets: No sensitive data detected in the selected mode.

modes.devDesc: API keys, tokens, DB credentials, SSH keys, email and phone numbers
modes.privacyDesc: ID card, bank card numbers, IP and MAC addresses
modes.logDesc: Dev keys + IP and MAC addresses — safe for sharing logs

heic.title: HEIC Converter
heic.description: Convert HEIC/HEIF images to JPEG, PNG, or Bitmap. Supports multiple files and batch ZIP download. All processing runs locally.
heic.dropFiles: Drop HEIC / HEIF files or click to select

zip-inspector.title: ZIP Inspector
zip-inspector.description: Inspect ZIP archive contents — file tree, sizes, and compression ratios. All processing runs locally.
zip-inspector.dropFile: Drop ZIP file here, or click to select
zip-inspector.sizeWarning: Large file ({{size}}) — parsing may take a moment

ocr.title: OCR
ocr.description: Extract text from images using PP-OCRv6. Runs entirely in your browser — images never leave your device.
ocr.dropzone: Drop an image here, or click to upload
ocr.dropzone_hint: PNG · JPG · WebP · BMP · max 10 MB

bg-remove.title: Background Remover
bg-remove.description: Remove image backgrounds locally in your browser using BiRefNet AI.
bg-remove.dropImage: Drop image or click to select
bg-remove.errorLoad: Failed to load model. Check your network and try again.
bg-remove.errorProcess: Processing failed. Please try a different image.
bg-remove.errorOom: Insufficient memory to process this image. Try a smaller image or use a device with more RAM.

id-card.title: China ID Card
id-card.description: Parse a Chinese resident ID card number: region, date of birth, gender, age and validity. All computation runs locally — nothing is uploaded.
id-card.privacy: Runs entirely in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.

reason.format: Invalid format — must be 17 digits plus a digit or X
reason.birthdate: The encoded date of birth does not exist

name-risk.title: Name Risk Screener
name-risk.description: Check if a Chinese name has notable public associations, cultural taboos, or character-level risks before committing to it. All checks run locally.
name-risk.privacy: All checks run locally. No data is sent to any server.
name-risk.idle: Enter a name to start screening.
name-risk.cleanDetail: No notable risks detected in the current dataset. This is a preliminary check — we recommend further evaluation based on family preferences and real-world context.
name-risk.disclaimer: This tool provides preliminary association risk hints only and does not constitute legal or cultural authority. Results are advisory. Final naming decisions should account for family context and real-world use.

message.political_figure: This name is strongly associated with a prominent political figure. Consider carefully.
message.adult_content_character: This name is strongly associated with adult content not appropriate for a child's name.
message.negative_public_event: This name is closely tied to a negative public event.
message.high_frequency_name: This is a very common name and may lack distinctiveness in social, educational, or search contexts.
message.highly_bound_celebrity: This name closely matches a well-known celebrity or public figure and may carry strong associations.
message.fiction_character: This name is associated with a character from film, literature, or online content.
message.game_character: This name is associated with a well-known game character.
message.meme_bound_name: This name carries a strong internet meme or comedic association. Consider the context.
message.homophone_risk: The pronunciation of this name may produce awkward or negative homophones.
message.historical_figure: This name is strongly associated with a well-known historical figure.
message.mythology_figure: This name is strongly associated with a figure from mythology, religion, or legend.
message.brand_bound_name: This name is closely associated with a brand, product, or commercial IP.
message.trendy_name_character: This name contains characters popular in recent years and may feel template-like or lack distinctiveness.
message.folk_naming_taboo_character: This name contains characters that some folk naming traditions consider inauspicious. For family reference only.
message.compound_surname_risk: This name may use a compound, blended, or over-designed surname structure. Consider evaluating overall naturalness.
message.generation_association: This name or its characters carry a notable era association. Consider family aesthetics and context.
message.rare_character_risk: This name contains rare characters that may cause issues in ID systems, banking, travel, or online services.
message.reserved: This name has a pending review for potential public associations. Consider carefully.

name-risk.loadError: Failed to load name risk data

payroll-cn.title: China Payroll Calculator
payroll-cn.description: Calculate full social insurance & housing fund (五险一金), individual income tax, take-home pay and employer cost from a pre-tax salary. All computation runs locally.
payroll-cn.fullBaseHint: Contributing on actual salary, capped to {{min}}–{{max}}.
payroll-cn.privacy: All computation runs locally. No data is sent to any server.
payroll-cn.idle: Enter a pre-tax salary to see the breakdown.
payroll-cn.disclaimer: Rates and bases use {{year}} figures for reference and vary by city and district. Verify with your local social security bureau. This tool is for estimation only.
payroll-cn.taxNote: Estimated by the annualized method, assuming a constant monthly salary.
payroll-cn.baseClamped: Salary is outside the base limits; the contribution base was capped or floored.

flexible-insurance.title: Flexible Employment Insurance
flexible-insurance.description: Calculate monthly social insurance for flexible-employment / self-employed workers in China — pension and medical, paid entirely by yourself. All computation runs locally.
flexible-insurance.medicalApprox: This city's medical rate is an estimate — verify with the local bureau and adjust below.
flexible-insurance.privacy: All computation runs locally. No data is sent to any server.
flexible-insurance.disclaimer: Rates and bases use {{year}} figures for reference and vary by city and district. Verify with your local social security bureau. This tool is for estimation only.
flexible-insurance.note: Flexible workers pay the full amount themselves. Pension and medical apply; some cities also include unemployment. No work-injury / maternity / housing fund, and income tax is not included.
flexible-insurance.medicalFlat: This city charges a fixed monthly medical fee that does not scale with the base.

beijing-getihu.title: Beijing Sole Proprietor Social Insurance Minimum
beijing-getihu.description: Minimum monthly social insurance (五险) for a Beijing 个体工商户 (sole proprietorship) paying both the employer and employee portions at the contribution floor. Compare years with a line chart and an official-style levy bill. All computation runs locally.
beijing-getihu.context: Non-Beijing-household residents cannot enroll in Beijing flexible-employment insurance, so many register a 个体工商户 (sole proprietorship) and pay as an employer — covering both the employer and employee portions themselves. This shows the minimum standard at the contribution floor.
beijing-getihu.disclaimer: Based on Beijing official base floors and combined employer+employee rates (five insurances 37.2% + ¥3 fixed 大额医疗), verified against real 个体工商户 levy figures (2025 ¥2,667.27). Figures vary and may be adjusted — verify with the Beijing social security authorities. Estimation only. The work-injury rate is industry-dependent (0.2%–1.9%); 0.4% is used here to match the reference bill.

img-compress.title: Image Compressor
img-compress.description: Compress and convert JPEG, PNG, and WebP images locally. Powered by MozJPEG, OxiPNG, and WebP WASM. Nothing leaves your browser.
img-compress.drop: Drop an image here, or click to browse
img-compress.dropHint: Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP · Max 20 MB
img-compress.losslessDesc: Preserve every pixel — no quality loss
img-compress.errorFormat: Unsupported format. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP file.

wordbook.title: Wordbook
wordbook.description: Browse curated vocabulary lists for study. Copy or download the full word list.

restaurant-breakeven.title: Restaurant Break-even Calculator
restaurant-breakeven.description: Estimate your restaurant's break-even revenue, monthly profit, and payback period from rent, labor, food cost, and other expenses. All computation runs locally.
restaurant-breakeven.upfrontHint: Optional — only affects the payback period below
restaurant-breakeven.startupOther: Other startup costs (licenses, opening marketing, etc.)
restaurant-breakeven.privacy: All computation runs locally. No data is sent to any server.
restaurant-breakeven.statBreakevenSub: Revenue needed to cover all costs
restaurant-breakeven.disclaimer: This estimate uses a simplified model (fixed costs + variable cost rate) and excludes depreciation, taxes, and seasonality. For quick feasibility checks only — combine with local market research before deciding.
